nodes.label: Tomorrowland Logo — Cyber Bike SVG
nodes.description: A 40x40 px SVG logo for the Tomorrowland application rendered in a cyberpunk/HUD aesthetic. The background is a near-black deep navy (#060c1a) with rounded corners (rx=5), overlaid with a subtle dark-blue grid (6 horizontal and vertical lines at 10-unit intervals, stroke #0d2a44) and semi-transparent cyan scanlines (#00e5ff, opacity 0.04) producing a retro-CRT monitor feel. The central illustration is a side-profile diamond-frame bicycle rendered entirely in neon cyan (#00e5ff) with a Gaussian-blur glow filter, giving it an electroluminescent appearance. The bike features two equal wheels (r=7.5) each with 6 spokes radiating at 60-degree intervals and solid filled hub dots. The frame follows classic bicycle geometry: seat tube, top tube, down tube, seat stays, chain stays, a short angled head tube, a fork, a horizontal handlebar with stem, and a horizontal saddle bar. A dashed chainring circle is drawn at the bottom bracket and a pedal crank indicator line is present. Surrounding the entire composition are four HUD-style corner bracket decorations (L-shaped polylines in neon cyan with neon-soft glow, opacity 0.45), evoking a targeting reticle or heads-up display frame. The overall design language is cyberpunk/sci-fi: dark background, neon glow effects, grid overlay, scanlines, and HUD corner brackets, combined with a bicycle motif that serves as the brand icon.
visual_elements: dark navy background with rounded corners
neon cyan diamond-frame bicycle with glow
